Exclusive global launch! This item is crafted with the same Italian custom as the authentic boutique version, featuring dynamic chip code changing, original factory exclusive materials, and original factory electroplated all-steel hardware (color matches the authentic).

items.name_en: SAUMUR BB Twin Star Series M46740 Uninspected Version #
items.name_cn:
SAUMUR BB Twin Star Series M46740 Uninspected Version #
❐ Size: 20*16*7.5cm ❐
The SAUMUR BB series has become a "must-have bag king". The classic monogram colorway is simple and retro. The aura of the Twin Star itself brings its own atmosphere, and the visual appeal is unexpectedly high-class!
Habitually free your hands; the strap is flexibly adjustable, and the capacity is impressive! One bag, multiple ways to carry, versatile for any season!
Trust me, this is a must-have; it has been a top-tier best-seller with consistent price premiums!

sᴀɪɴᴛ ʟᴀᴜʀᴇɴᴛ
【VOLTAIRE 】24 New Voltaire Mini Ellipse Shoulder Bag! Super chic minimalist design, showcasing the ultimate YSL French style and a very authentic vintage feel. Suitable for hand or shoulder carry. The front flap features a novel LE CASSANDRE turn-lock. The leather-lined bag with bronze hardware is simple and elegant. This is the simplest way to get one.
Item No.: S8098
Size: 21×11×4.5cm

items.name_en: SERPENTI FOREVER Medium Tote, made of calf leather with sheepskin lining. It skillfully blends classic design with modern style, fully showcasing the endless charm of the collection. This easy-to-wear bag incorporates new details into iconic elements, featuring a leather shoulder strap and a signature snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection. It features a compartment, a front pocket, an external back zip pocket, an internal open pocket, and a mirror pouch with a customizable mirror. The back is adorned with a BVLGARI metal logo.

Size: 20.5 X 15 X 9

 #Loulou puffer#Medium 29CM🐑Quilted Sheepskin Bag, made from original factory authentic leather, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes use gold-plated matte silver hardware, the bag opening folds and uses a magnetic four-buckle closure, excellent sealing and security; inside features a zippered pocket for phone and valuables, no extra pockets otherwise, use it freely! Size: 29x17x11cm
Model: 577476
